title: fractal-indexing-viz: Interactive visualizations for fractal mathematics in modern indexing systems
description: A Streamlit application that makes fractal mathematics under modern indexing systems visceral and interactive. Five visualizations: (v0) Hilbert curves with intrinsic-dimension D2 heatmap overlay; (v1) HNSW layer rendering with local-intrinsic-dimensionality coloring; (v2) streaming MFDFA spectra on rolling financial windows; (v3) selectivity-estimation error comparison across PostgreSQL, DeepDB and D2-based estimators; (v4) Manim box-counting walk-through. Companion to the fractal-indexing research program; sources figures for the H2 pre-registration and the H3 pivot paper.
